titleStmt.title: SII 25.179: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 179. (A.R. No. 179 of 1908.) TIRUNAṞAIYŪR, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Siddhanāthasvāmi temple.
This inscription is dated in the 11th+1st year of the king. It does not give any praśasti of the king. The record may palaeographically be assigned to c. 12th century.

It records the gift of a kāśu deposited into the treasury of the temple by a certain Tiruvāṉaikkāvaṉ Udayañjeydāṉ, a chief of Neḍumbulam in Puṟaṅkarambai-nāḍu in Rājēndraśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu for maintaining a sandhi lamp to the deity Siddhīśvaram-uḍaiyār of Tirunaṟaiyūr-nāḍu. The Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple have agreed to maintain the gift from out of the amount deposited in the treasury by the donor.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . vikkiramacoḻa devarkku yāṇṭu
patiṉoṉṟāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu tirunaṟaiyū
r nāṭṭuc cittiśvaramuṭaiyār koyilil śi
vabrāhmaṇaṉ Āttiraiyaṉ maturāntakaṉ U
ruṭṭiya cevaṭiyum kāśyapan coṉṉavāṟaṟi
vāṉ Aṅkamāḷiyum mokiliyaṉiṉṟāṉ
mātavapaṭṭaṉum Āttiraiyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ Ampala niṟaintā
ṉum Ivvaṉaivom rājentira coḻavaḷanāṭṭup puṟaṅkarampaiṉāṭṭu
neṭumpulamuṭaiyāṉ tiruvāṉaikkāvaṉ Utaiyañceytāṉ Ittevarkku vait
ta san=tiviḷakku Oṉṟukku Ittevar śrīpaṇṭārattu Oṭukkiṉa kācu 1 Ikkāco
ṉṟum nāṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭu cantirātittavaṟ cellak kaṭavatāka .
Digital edition of SII 25.179 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
